label: Flow 1 — MQTT Ingestion
info:
Subscribes to building/# on Mosquitto (WebSocket ws://mosquitto:9001).
Extracts sensor type from topic → routes to per-type parser.
Each parser validates required fields per NODERED_CONTRACT.md §5.
Output 1 of each parser = valid msg (→ Flow 2).
Output 2 of each parser = invalid msg (→ debug error).

label: Flow 2 — Normalisation
info:
Receives validated raw events from Flow 1 via link in.
Produces a UnifiedEvent conforming to NODERED_CONTRACT.md:
  - 13 required fields present
  - ai_score / ai_classification MUST NOT be set (Pydantic extra=forbid)
  - payload.kind == event_type (discriminated union)
  - schema_version: 1.0.0

To wire up: in Flow 1, add a 'link out' after each parser output 1 (valid),
point them all to the link in node id: linkin200000001

label: Flow 5 — Device Health
info:
IoT device health monitoring — Architecture.md §5.2 Flow 5.

Path A (heartbeat tracker):
  link in ← same link out as Flow 2 (all valid events from Flow 1)
  → Update last seen  [stores flow.lastSeen[deviceId] = Date.now()]

Path B (periodic check):
  inject every 30s → Check device health
    → debug ⚠ Device OFFLINE
    → mqtt out → building/B1/device/alert

Offline threshold: 120 000 ms (2 minutes).
Payload format: NODERED_CONTRACT.md §5.7 DEVICE_STATUS.

name:
Flow 1 — MQTT Multi-source Ingestion
broker: ws://mosquitto:9001 | topic: building/# | QoS 1 | MQTT 3.1.1
Contract: NODERED_CONTRACT.md §5
Extract Sensor Type
Parse Badge
Parse Door
Parse Motion
Parse Camera
Parse Network

Flow 2 — Normalisation & Enrichment
Input: validated raw events from Flow 1 (via link in)
Output: UnifiedEvent ready for Kafka events.raw
Contract: NODERED_CONTRACT.md — 13 fields, extra=forbid

HOW TO CONNECT FLOW 1:
Add a 'link out' node after each parser valid output in Flow 1.
Set each link out target to this link in node (id: linkin200000001).
Normalize to UnifiedEvent
Validate before Kafka

Flow 5 — Device Health Monitoring
Path A: heartbeat tracker (link in ← Flow 1 valid events)
Path B: 30s timer → offline check → MQTT alert
Contract: NODERED_CONTRACT.md §5.7 DEVICE_STATUS

HOW TO CONNECT FLOW 1:
Add the same 'link out' nodes used for Flow 2 to also target this link in (id: linkin500000001).
OR add a second link out in Flow 1 pointing here.
Update last seen
Check device health
